nodes.name: build-venv.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that creates and populates a Python virtual environment with the dependencies required to run the connector-node Python client.

nodes.name: format-python.sh
nodes.summary: One-liner script that runs the Python code formatter (e.g., black or autopep8) over the Python client source files.

nodes.name: gen-stub.sh
nodes.summary: One-liner script that generates Python gRPC stubs from the connector-node Protobuf definitions using grpc_tools.protoc.
